title: lycopus lucidus var. typicus
intro: Lycopus lucidus var. typicus, also known as European bugle, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Lycopus lucidus var. typicus include reducing inflammation and relieving symptoms of colds, fever, and digestive issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
